description: CAB Campaign email sequence templates. Step 1 content lives in lead.agent3 (written by Agent 3). Steps 2-4 are rendered from spintax at send time.

1.note: Step 1 subject and body come from lead.agent3.subject_line and lead.agent3.email_body_text — already personalized by Agent 3. Do not render from templates.

2.note: Thread reply. Subject is auto-set to 'Re: ' + lead.sequence.steps[0].subject_rendered. No subject spintax needed.

3.note: New thread. Full re-intro. Leads with peer community + thought leadership angle.
3.subject_spintax: {{FIRST_NAME} advisory board|Advisory board invite|{FIRST_NAME} advisory seat|Board seat invite|Founding advisor — {FIRST_NAME}|{FIRST_NAME}, founding CAB seat|Invitation to board|Hiring board invite|Private board invite|{FIRST_NAME} advisory invite|Board opportunity|Shaping hiring's future — {FIRST_NAME}}

4.note: Graceful breakup. New thread. No CTA, no opt-out line. Leave door open.
4.subject_spintax: {Closing the loop, {FIRST_NAME}|One last note, {FIRST_NAME}|{FIRST_NAME} — closing out|Leaving the door open, {FIRST_NAME}}
